sections.paragraph:
Original: חלחוּל

Transliteration: chalchûl

Phonetic: khal-khool'

BDB Definition:

Halhul = "trembling"
  1. a town on a hill in the mountains of Judah to the left of the road from Jerusalem to Hebron and about 3-4 (5-7 kilometers) miles from Hebron

Origin: by reduplication from H2342

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
